Bus Timings

Bus 56 Timings Danube Metro Landside to Dubai World Central, Staff Village

January 15, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Let’s talk about Bus 56 - it’s the unsung hero connecting Danube Metro Landside to Dubai World Central, Staff Village. This route’s a real lifesaver for folks shuttling between the busy shopping areas and their digs at Dubai World Central. Whether you’re a local heading to work or just out to hit the shops, Bus 56 has got your back.

It swings by all those important industrial zones and malls, making it a breeze to get around without the headache of driving. So if you’re looking to hop between some of Dubai’s key spots without breaking a sweat, just jump on the 56 and let it do the heavy lifting.

Route Name 56
Route Description Danube Metro Landside - Dubai World Central, Staff Village
Total Distance Approximately 15.6 to 23.4 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 47 minutes
Operational Hours 09:00 to 22:00 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 5
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 56

Bus 56 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

From Danube Metro Landside From Dubai World Central, Staff Village
10:00 09:00
12:00 11:00
14:00 13:00
16:02 15:00
18:03 17:01
20:06 19:02
22:00 21:01

Bus 56 Timetable

For the complete timetable, visit the RTA’s official page, or simply click here for Bus 56 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus 56 is AED 5. This price provides an economical option for traveling along the entire route, making it an affordable choice for both daily commuters and occasional passengers. The fare structure ensures that the service remains accessible to a broad range of travelers. Additionally, this pricing supports efficient and cost-effective public transportation within Dubai’s extensive network.

Bus Booking

Tickets for Bus 56 can be purchased directly from the bus. While online booking options are not available for this route, passengers can use the RTA’s official website or mobile app for route information, schedules, and real-time updates. The app provides a user-friendly way to check bus timings and track buses live, enhancing the travel experience.

Bus Route

The Bus 56 route is designed to cover major stops in both the Danube and Jebel Ali areas, and extends to Dubai World Central. Here is the complete route:

  1. Danube Metro Landside

2.

3.

  1. Jebel Ali, Parco Hypermarket

  2. Jebel Ali Industrial Area, Qaser Al Kabayel Center

  3. Jebel Ali Industrial Area 11

  4. Landmark Group

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Amssar Wood Manufacturing

  2. Dubai World Central, Staff Village

Some other Dubai bus routes you can check are the 61D bus route, which runs from Nad Al Shiba, Clinic to Ghubaiba Bus Station, and the 66 route, which operates from Ghubaiba Bus Station to Faqa, Terminus / Al Faqa’a Family Park.

Bus 56 Station Overview

Danube Metro Landside

Danube Metro Landside bus station is located adjacent to the Danube Metro station, serving as a critical transportation link for passengers in the area. This station is equipped with essential amenities, including sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates.

Its strategic location near the metro station facilitates seamless transfers between bus and metro services, making it a convenient stop for daily commuters and travelers. The station’s proximity to key commercial and residential areas ensures efficient connectivity and enhances the overall travel experience for passengers using this transit point.

Intersection of Bus Routes at Muhaisnah 4, Jamal Building

The bus stop at Muhaisnah 4, Jamal Building is a significant intersection for Bus Routes X28, 34, and 56. This key location connects these routes, providing efficient transit options and easy access to various destinations within the Muhaisnah area and beyond. The stop is equipped with essential amenities and real-time schedule updates to enhance the travel experience for passengers using these intersecting bus services.

Dubai World Central, Staff Village

This station features amenities such as sheltered waiting areas and up-to-date bus schedule information.

Its location within the staff village ensures convenient access for employees commuting to and from their workplaces within the DWC zone.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 56 travels through several locations in Dubai, with a focus on areas that cater to commercial, industrial, and logistical needs. Here are some notable points along the route: 1.

  1. Jebel Ali, Parco Hypermarket: Located in Jebel Ali, this hypermarket is part of a larger retail and commercial area, providing shopping opportunities for everyday needs.

  2. Landmark Group: This area houses various retail and service outlets under the Landmark Group, a major retail conglomerate in the region.

4.

Journey Experience

Taking Bus Route 56 from Danube Metro Landside to Dubai World Central, Staff Village is a captivating journey that showcases Dubai’s rapid development and unique attractions. Starting at the Danube Metro station, you’ll enjoy a smooth ride through areas known for their modern architecture and vibrant communities.

This trip offers a fascinating view of the city’s innovative designs and extensive planning, making it a great choice for commuters and explorers alike who are interested in urban development and architecture.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can travel to Dubai World Central, Staff Village, the furthest point on the Bus 56 route, starting from Danube Metro Landside. The fare for this journey ranges from AED 84 to 101, offering a convenient and efficient way to reach this important business and residential hub. Whether you’re heading to the staff village or exploring the surrounding areas, Careem provides a reliable transportation option to complete your trip comfortably.

Bus 56 is an essential part of Dubai’s public transport network, linking key commercial areas with staff accommodation at Dubai World Central. With its well-planned route, regular service, and affordable fare, it offers a reliable and practical travel solution for residents and workers in these regions. Whether you are commuting for work or shopping, Bus 56 provides a seamless connection across important destinations in Dubai.
